controls.full_text: The entity collects and maintains accurate, up-to-date, complete, and relevant personal information to meet the entity's objectives related to privacy. Points of focus include: (1) Ensures Accuracy and Completeness — Procedures are in place to ensure personal information is accurate and complete for the purposes for which it is collected and used; (2) Ensures Relevance — Procedures are in place to ensure only personal information relevant to the purposes for which it is to be used is collected.
evidence_requirements: Data quality management procedures for personal information
Data accuracy verification and validation processes
Data relevance assessment documentation
Data quality metrics and monitoring reports

controls.title: Privacy Monitoring and Enforcement
controls.description: The entity implements a process for receiving, addressing, resolving, and communicating the resolution of inquiries, complaints, and disputes from data subjects and others and periodically monitors compliance to meet the entity's objectives related to privacy.
controls.full_text: The entity implements a process for receiving, addressing, resolving, and communicating the resolution of inquiries, complaints, and disputes from data subjects and others and periodically monitors compliance to meet the entity's objectives related to privacy. Points of focus include: (1) Establishes and Communicates Process — A process for receiving, addressing, resolving, and communicating the resolution of inquiries, complaints, and disputes from data subjects and others is established and communicated; (2) Documents and Communicates Dispute Resolution — Each complaint or dispute is documented, and the resolution is communicated to the individual; (3) Documents and Reports Compliance Review Results — Compliance with privacy policies and the effectiveness of the privacy control activities are periodically monitored and documented; (4) Documents and Reports Instances of Noncompliance — Instances of noncompliance with privacy policies, procedures, and obligations are documented and reported and, if needed, corrective and disciplinary measures are taken on a timely basis; (5) Performs Ongoing Monitoring — Ongoing procedures are performed for monitoring the effectiveness of controls over personal information.
evidence_requirements: Privacy complaint and inquiry tracking system
Complaint resolution documentation and response records
Privacy compliance monitoring reports and audit results
Privacy noncompliance incident reports and corrective action plans

controls.title: Encryption Key Management
controls.description: The entity manages encryption keys used to protect confidential information and personal data throughout their lifecycle.
controls.full_text: The entity manages encryption keys used to protect confidential information and personal data throughout their lifecycle. Points of focus include: (1) Defines Encryption Key Management Procedures — Procedures for the generation, distribution, storage, rotation, revocation, and destruction of encryption keys are defined and implemented; (2) Restricts Access to Encryption Keys — Access to encryption keys is restricted to authorized personnel; (3) Rotates Encryption Keys Periodically — Encryption keys are rotated on a defined schedule or when compromise is suspected.
evidence_requirements: Encryption key management policy and procedures
Key rotation schedules and evidence of rotation
Key access control configurations
Key custodian assignments and responsibilities

controls.title: Security Event Logging
controls.description: The entity implements logging and monitoring of security-relevant events to support the detection of security incidents and support forensic investigation activities.
controls.full_text: The entity implements logging and monitoring of security-relevant events to support the detection of security incidents and support forensic investigation activities. Points of focus include: (1) Captures Security Events in Logs — Security-relevant events are captured in system and application logs; (2) Protects Log Integrity — Log data is protected from unauthorized modification or deletion; (3) Retains Logs for Required Periods — Logs are retained for periods defined by policy and regulatory requirements; (4) Reviews Logs Regularly — Logs are reviewed on a regular basis to identify potential security incidents.
evidence_requirements: Logging policy with defined security events to capture
Log integrity protection mechanisms (write-once storage, checksums)
Log retention configuration and compliance evidence
Log review procedures and sample review records

controls.title: Business Continuity Planning
controls.description: The entity develops, maintains, and tests business continuity plans to ensure continuity of operations during and after significant disruptions.
controls.full_text: The entity develops, maintains, and tests business continuity plans to ensure continuity of operations during and after significant disruptions. Points of focus include: (1) Develops Business Continuity Plans — Business continuity plans are developed that address critical business processes, recovery time objectives, and recovery point objectives; (2) Tests Business Continuity Plans — Business continuity plans are tested on a periodic basis to confirm their effectiveness; (3) Updates Business Continuity Plans — Plans are updated based on test results, organizational changes, and changes in the threat landscape.
evidence_requirements: Business continuity plan documentation
BCP testing schedules, scenarios, and results
RTO/RPO definitions for critical systems
BCP update and version history records

controls.title: Incident Communication for Availability Events
controls.description: The entity communicates with internal and external users about system availability incidents and planned downtime to meet the entity's objectives.
controls.full_text: The entity communicates with internal and external users about system availability incidents and planned downtime to meet the entity's objectives. Points of focus include: (1) Communicates Planned Downtime — Users are notified in advance of planned system downtime; (2) Communicates Unplanned Outages — Users are notified of unplanned system outages and provided with status updates; (3) Provides Status Page or Dashboard — A mechanism is available for users to check system status.
evidence_requirements: Incident communication procedures for availability events
Status page or system health dashboard
Planned maintenance notification records
Unplanned outage notification and status update records

controls.title: Access Restrictions for Confidential Information
controls.description: The entity restricts access to confidential information to authorized personnel based on their roles and responsibilities.
controls.full_text: The entity restricts access to confidential information to authorized personnel based on their roles and responsibilities. Points of focus include: (1) Restricts Access to Confidential Information — Access to confidential information is restricted to authorized individuals whose job responsibilities require such access; (2) Identifies Confidential Information in System Design — System design includes mechanisms to restrict access to confidential information; (3) Reviews Access Periodically — Access to confidential information is reviewed on a periodic basis for appropriateness.
evidence_requirements: Access control lists for confidential data repositories
Periodic access review results for confidential information
Role-based access configurations for confidential systems
Confidential information access request and approval records

controls.title: Cross-Border Data Transfers
controls.description: The entity ensures that personal information transferred across borders is protected in accordance with applicable privacy requirements and the entity's privacy commitments.
controls.full_text: The entity ensures that personal information transferred across borders is protected in accordance with applicable privacy requirements and the entity's privacy commitments. Points of focus include: (1) Identifies Cross-Border Transfers — The entity identifies situations where personal information is transferred across jurisdictional borders; (2) Implements Safeguards for Cross-Border Transfers — Appropriate safeguards are implemented to protect personal information during cross-border transfers, such as standard contractual clauses, binding corporate rules, or adequacy decisions; (3) Monitors Cross-Border Transfer Compliance — Compliance with cross-border transfer requirements is monitored.
evidence_requirements: Cross-border data transfer inventory and mapping
Standard contractual clauses or binding corporate rules
Transfer impact assessments
Cross-border transfer monitoring and compliance reports

controls.title: Government and Legal Disclosure Requests
controls.description: The entity discloses personal information to government authorities and in response to legal process only as required by applicable law and in accordance with the entity's privacy commitments.
controls.full_text: The entity discloses personal information to government authorities and in response to legal process only as required by applicable law and in accordance with the entity's privacy commitments. Points of focus include: (1) Evaluates Legal Disclosure Requests — Legal requests for personal information disclosure are evaluated by qualified personnel; (2) Documents Legal Disclosures — Disclosures of personal information in response to legal process or government requests are documented; (3) Limits Disclosure to Required Information — Only the personal information required by the legal request is disclosed.
evidence_requirements: Legal disclosure request evaluation procedures
Government/legal request tracking register
Legal counsel review documentation for disclosure requests
Records of information disclosed in response to legal requests
